positioning.headline: Have your best baby.
supporting_lines: The future of IVF for clinics.
The all inclusive IVF package to give your child the best start in life.
Nucleus Embryo: The choice is yours.
positioning.voice: Direct, provocative, future-facing, premium, and unapologetically aspirational.

core_offers.name: Nucleus Preview
details: Preview your future child's health, traits and potential before pregnancy begins.
Partner sync and option for 1:1 genetic counseling.
core_offers.pricing: Official site copy says starting at $499 on the What's Included page. Preview shop page contains unresolved dynamic pricing tokens.

core_offers.name: Nucleus Embryo
details: Analyze and compare up to 20 embryos.
Works with existing PGT lab results.
Claims 2000+ hereditary conditions plus 40 additional analyses beyond basic viability.
core_offers.pricing: Consult / application led via IVF+ and clinic pathways.

core_offers.name: Nucleus IVF+
details: End-to-end IVF experience from consultation through birth.
Positioned around more transparency, more personalized care, and advanced genetic medicine.
Partner clinics include Beverly Hills Fertility, Neway Fertility, and Clínica de la Fertilidad.

core_offers.name: Nucleus Health
details: 1000x more DNA sequenced than microarray-style consumer tests.
core_offers.pricing: Official site copy says starting at $499.

audience.primary: Future parents and IVF patients who want more control, more data, and more peace of mind before choosing an embryo or clinic path.
audience.secondary: Couples who want carrier screening and genetic counseling before pregnancy.
audience.clinic: Fertility clinics evaluating whether to join the IVF+ network.

pain_points: The IVF journey feels like a maze of uncertainty, frustration, and confusion.
Different doctors, different opinions, and future-child health data scattered across reports.
Standard tests only catch a fraction of what matters.
Patients want a better IVF experience, not just another lab report.
desires: Give your child the best possible start in life.
Make thoughtful choices about your future baby.
Reduce disease risk and gain more transparency.
Feel peace of mind with more complete genetic information.
unique_mechanism: Whole-genome screening + partner syncing + embryo analysis + clinic integration.
Preview + Embryo + IVF+ repositioned as one connected decision system.
Origin research models and open-weight benchmark framing used as scientific credibility.

clinical_and_scientific: Nathan Treff, Ph.D., HCLD - Chief Clinical Officer
Lasse Folkersen, Ph.D. - Chief Scientific Officer
Barry Starr, Ph.D. - Director of Scientific Communications
Jerry Lanchbury, Ph.D. - Scientific Advisory Board / former Myriad CSO

testimonials.quote: The obvious answer to us was, we wanted to start with the one embryo that was most likely to grow up to be a healthy adult.
testimonials.name: First Nucleus Embryo couple

testimonials.quote: We concluded that Nucleus was the one and only company that best reflected our values and that best reflected the state of the art.
testimonials.name: First Nucleus Embryo couple

testimonials.quote: Just found that my genetic risk of diabetes is higher than 99.9% who share the same ancestry as me. This stuff is priceless.
testimonials.name: Yasir A

testimonials.quote: Nucleus confirmed the knowledge I already have about my family history, but I also found out that I'm at elevated risk for coronary artery disease, insomnia, and multiple sclerosis.
testimonials.name: Maxx Y

testimonials.quote: I discovered I was at a very high risk for a condition I'd never even heard of-Hereditary Hemochromatosis-which would ultimately change my life.
testimonials.name: Ethan C

assets.logo_type: Inline SVG wordmark copied from live page source
